 Verifying : ntp-4.2.6p5-29.el7.centos.2.x86_64 2/3 
 Verifying : autogen-libopts-5.18-5.el7.x86_64 3/3 

Installed:
 ntp.x86_64 0:4.2.6p5-29.el7.centos.2 

Dependency Installed:
 autogen-libopts.x86_64 0:5.18-5.el7 ntpdate.x86_64 0:4.2.6p5-29.el7.centos.2 

Complete!
" ]} 我们看到，返回结果中的换行是用
来表示的，可以自行查找文档切换成yml ansible output format.再次运行结果返回Success并提示服务已经安装了1234567891011192.168.60.6 | SUCCESS => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "changed": false, "msg": "", "rc": 0, "results": [ "ntp-4.2.6p5-29.el7.centos.2.x86_64 providing ntp is already installed" ]} 如果切换sudo用户需要密码，可以在命令中添加-K或者--ask-become-pass来输入密码。下面，演示ansible service module, google可以找到文档，或者使用：ansible-doc service命令查看文档说明。使用如下命令来启动ntpd并开启开机自启动1ansible multi -i inventory -b -m service -a "name=ntpd state=started enabled=yes" 注意，这里必须加上-b参数，因为需要用到sudo，否则会报错：1234567192.168.60.5 | FAILED! => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "changed": false, "msg": "Unable to enable service ntpd: Failed to execute operation: Connection timed out
"} 快速停止和时间同步：12ansible multi -i inventory -b -a "service ntpd stop"ansible multi -i inventory -b -a "ntpdate -q 0.rhel.pool.ntp.org" 不过，最好使用-m service. 3.4 Configure groups of servers, or individual servers3.4.1 Configure the Application servers我们现在app分组上安装Django和相关依赖，由于Django不在CentOS的yum仓库中，因此我们使用pip安装它：12ansible app -i inventory -b -m yum -a "name=python3-pip state=present"ansible app -i inventory -b -m pip -a "name=django<4 state=present" 当我们执行第二条命令使用pip来安装django的时候报错：1234567192.168.60.4 | FAILED! => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "changed": false, "msg": "Unable to find any of pip2, pip to use. pip needs to be installed."} 参考： https://stackoverflow.com/questions/51997637/ansible-pip-not-found使用下面的命令重新安装pip：12ansible app -i inventory -b -m yum -a "name=python-setuptools state=present"ansible app -i inventory -b -m easy_install -a "name=pip state=present" 再次执行pip模块安装即可成功：1ansible app -i inventory -b -m pip -a "name=django<4 state=present" 3.4.2 Configure the Database servers12ansible db -i inventory -b -m yum -a "name=mariadb-server state=present"ansible db -i inventory -b -m service -a "name=mariadb state=started enabled=yes" 接下来配置防火墙，确保只有app分组机器可以访问数据库：12345ansible db -i inventory -b -m yum -a "name=firewalld state=present"ansible db -i inventory -b -m service -a "name=firewalld state=started enabled=yes"ansible db -i inventory -b -m firewalld -a "zone=database state=present permanent=yes"ansible db -i inventory -b -m firewalld -a "source=192.168.60.0/24 zone=database state=enabled permanent=yes"ansible db -i inventory -b -m firewalld -a "port=3306/tcp zone=database state=enabled permanent=yes" 下面，需要配置允许app分组机器的一个用户能够访问mysql：12ansible db -i inventory -b -m yum -a "name=python3-PyMySQL state=present"ansible db -i inventory -b -m mysql_user -a "name=django host=% password=12345 priv=*.*:ALL state=present" 执行第二条命令的时候报错：12345678(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible db -i inventory -b -m mysql_user -a "name=django host=% password=12345 priv=*.*:ALL state=present"192.168.60.6 | FAILED! => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "changed": false, "msg": "The PyMySQL (Python 2.7 and Python 3.X) or MySQL-python (Python 2.X) module is required."} 重新执行下面这组命令即可解决：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible db -i inventory -b -m yum -a "name=python-setuptools state=present"192.168.60.6 | SUCCESS => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "changed": false, "msg": "", "rc": 0, "results": [ "python-setuptools-0.9.8-7.el7.noarch providing python-setuptools is already installed" ]}(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible db -i inventory -b -m easy_install -a "name=PyMySQL state=present"192.168.60.6 | CHANGED => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "binary": "/bin/easy_install", "changed": true, "name": "PyMySQL", "virtualenv": null}(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible db -i inventory -b -m mysql_user -a "name=django host=% password=12345 priv=*.*:ALL state=present"192.168.60.6 | CHANGED => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "changed": true, "msg": "User added", "user": "django"} 接下来，我们就可以使用用户名django和密码12345连接到mysql了。 3.4.3 Make changes to just one server可以使用--limit ip限制在指定分组的哪台机器上执行：12345(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible -i inventory app -a "free -m" --limit "192.168.60.4"192.168.60.4 | CHANGED | rc=0 >> total used free shared buff/cache availableMem: 234 71 49 1 113 152Swap: 1023 30 993 为了避免频繁地指定inventory，我们添加一个inventory.cfg文件，指定如下内容：12[defaults]INVENTORY=inventory 3.5 Manage users and groups添加与删除分组：12ansible app -b -m group -a "name=admin state=present"ansible app -b -m group -a "name=admin state=absent" 添加与删除用户：12ansible app -b -m user -a "name=alexis group=admin createhome=yes"ansible app -b -m user -a "name=alexis state=absent remove=yes" 更多关于用户和组模块信息，参照文档：https://docs.ansible.com/ansible/2.4/user_module.html 3.6 Manage packages如果你想在不同的操作系统上安装一个通用的包，如git，可以使用package模块：1ansible app -b -m package -a "name=git state=present" 3.7 Manage files and directories3.7.1 Get information about a fileIf you need to check a file’s permissions, MD5, or owner, use Ansible’s stat module:1ansible multi -m stat -a "path=/etc/environment" 这条命令以json格式返回该文件的详细信息。 3.7.2 Copy a file to the servers1ansible multi -m copy -a "src=/etc/hosts dest=/tmp/hosts" 如果src中指定的是目录，且以/结尾，则只拷贝内容，否则包括路径一起拷贝 3.7.3 Retrieve a file from the servers12345678910111213141516171819202122232425(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible multi -b -m fetch -a "src=/etc/hosts dest=/tmp"192.168.60.6 | CHANGED => { "changed": true, "checksum": "5811e6c90c6f6dd4bef3f4d6c84f7afa11cb893e", "dest": "/tmp/192.168.60.6/etc/hosts", "md5sum": "fb1af75f1d60c5abbb76ddcecf7b6b9c", "remote_checksum": "5811e6c90c6f6dd4bef3f4d6c84f7afa11cb893e", "remote_md5sum": null}192.168.60.5 | CHANGED => { "changed": true, "checksum": "6c9d57059239094d403e80d5338442fa14675c3d", "dest": "/tmp/192.168.60.5/etc/hosts", "md5sum": "8e71932c63507aabdcc41cae917a42b0", "remote_checksum": "6c9d57059239094d403e80d5338442fa14675c3d", "remote_md5sum": null}192.168.60.4 | CHANGED => { "changed": true, "checksum": "1d4005c8208eaaaccd9b8cfa9a86dfc8ec30beae", "dest": "/tmp/192.168.60.4/etc/hosts", "md5sum": "8f55eb871f066514347d28d5d80f4b64", "remote_checksum": "1d4005c8208eaaaccd9b8cfa9a86dfc8ec30beae", "remote_md5sum": null} 文件拷贝到本地的时候会加上所属机器的IP，如：/tmp/192.168.60.6/etc/hosts 3.7.4 Create directories and files创建目录：1ansible multi -m file -a "dest=/tmp/test mode=644 state=directory" 创建链接：1$ ansible multi -m file -a "src=/src/file dest=/dest/symlink state=link" 删除文件和链接：1ansible multi -m file -a "dest=/tmp/test state=absent" 3.7.4 Run operations in the background可以通过指定如下两个参数让ansible任务后台异步执行： 12-B <seconds>: the maximum amount of time (in seconds) to let the job run.-P <seconds>: the amount of time (in seconds) to wait between polling the servers for an updated job status. 3.7.5 Update servers asynchronously with asynchronous jobs12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible multi -b -B 3600 -P 0 -a "yum -y update"192.168.60.6 | CHANGED => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "ansible_job_id": "565237211021.8311", "changed": true, "finished": 0, "results_file": "/root/.ansible_async/565237211021.8311", "started": 1}192.168.60.4 | CHANGED => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "ansible_job_id": "914459545.7981", "changed": true, "finished": 0, "results_file": "/root/.ansible_async/914459545.7981", "started": 1}192.168.60.5 | CHANGED => { "ansible_facts": { "discovered_interpreter_python": "/usr/bin/python" }, "ansible_job_id": "438212780040.7811", "changed": true, "finished": 0, "results_file": "/root/.ansible_async/438212780040.7811", "started": 1} 我们通过指定-P 0让ansible把命令同时发送到所有机器，并返回一个ansible_job_id接下来，我们就可以通过这个job_id来获取它的状态：1ansible multi -b -m async_status -a "jid=565237211021.8311" 3.8 Check log files查看文件的最后几行：12ansible multi -b -a "tail /var/log/messages"ansible multi -b -m shell -a "tail /var/log/messages | grep ansible-command | wc -l" 3.9 Manage cron jobs每天4点执行脚本：1ansible multi -b -m cron -a "name='daily-cron-all-servers' hour=4 job='/path/to/daily-script.sh'" ansible会为所有没有指定具体值的时间指定*,(valid values are day, hour, minute, month, and weekday).删除定时任务：1ansible multi -b -m cron -a "name='daily-cron-all-servers' state=absent" 3.10 Deploy a version-controlled applicationFirst, update the git checkout to the application’s new version branch, 1.2.4, on all the app servers:1$ ansible app -b -m git -a "repo=git://example.com/path/to/repo.git dest=/opt/myapp update=yes version=1.2.4" 虽然可以实现，但这个需求我们一般不会直接在ad-hoc命令中完成。 3.11 Destroy Vagrant VMs测试完成后，执行:1vagrant destroy -f kill掉测试用的机器。

posts.title: Chapter4-Ansible-Playbooks
posts.text: 4.1 Power plays首先，我们对比一下使用Shell的方式安装httpd和使用Playbook的方式安装httpd： Shell12345# Install Apache.yum install --quiet -y httpd httpd-devel# Start Apache and configure it to run at boot.service httpd startchkconfig httpd on 只需要将脚本内容放到shell文件shell-script.sh中，将脚本放到目标服务器上，添加可执行权限，直接执行即可。 Playbook123456789---- hosts: all tasks: - name: Install Apache. command: yum install --quiet -y httpd httpd-devel - name: Start Apache and configure it to run at boot. command: service httpd start - command: chkconfig httpd on 只需要将上述内容放到playbook.yml文件中，执行下面的命令即可安装：1234567891011121314151617181920(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter4 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.ymlPLAY [all] **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Install Apache.] **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************[WARNING]: Consider using the yum module rather than running 'yum'. If you need to use command because yum is insufficient you can add 'warn: false' to this command task or set 'command_warnings=False' in ansible.cfg to get rid of this message.changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Start Apache and configure it to run at boot.] ********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************[WARNING]: Consider using the service module rather than running 'service'. If you need to use command because service is insufficient you can add 'warn: false' to this command task or set 'command_warnings=False' in ansible.cfg to get rid of this message.changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [command] **********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=4 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 我们本次测试使用虚拟机：192.168.6.86测试前做如下准备工作：123456789101112(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter4 $ lltotal 24-rw------- 1 alexis staff 1679 Jan 4 17:05 id_rsa-rw-r--r-- 1 alexis staff 121 Jan 4 17:10 inventory-rw-r--r-- 1 alexis staff 237 Jan 4 17:18 playbook.yml(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter4 $ cat inventory[embrace]192.168.6.86[embrace:vars]ansible_user=rootansible_ssh_private_key_file=/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter4/id_rsa 即将86的id_rsa文件拷贝到本地，并配置到inventory的变量ansible_ssh_private_key_file中。 4.2 Running Playbooks with ansible-playbook上面的playbook脚本和shell的作用是一模一样的，我们可以使用ansible内置的一些module让结果更好，为了演示多文件复制，我们把安装好的httpd的conf目录下的两个文件httpd.conf和magic拷贝回来。1234567(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter4 $ lltotal 80-rw-r--r-- 1 alexis staff 11753 Jan 4 17:34 httpd.conf-rw------- 1 alexis staff 1679 Jan 4 17:05 id_rsa-rw-r--r-- 1 alexis staff 121 Jan 4 17:10 inventory-rw-r--r-- 1 alexis staff 13077 Jan 4 17:34 magic-rw-r--r-- 1 alexis staff 852 Jan 4 17:43 playbook.yml 修改playbook.yml内容如下，添加拷贝配置文件：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930---- hosts: all become: yes tasks: - name: Install Apache. yum: name: - httpd - httpd-devel state: present - name: Copy configuration files. copy: src: "{{ item.src }}" dest: "{{ item.dest }}" owner: root group: root mode: 0644 with_items: - src: httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf - src: magic dest: /etc/httpd/conf/magic - name: Make sure Apache is started now and at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: yes 再次执行：12345678910111213141516171819(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter4 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.ymlPLAY [all] **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Install Apache.] **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy configuration files.] ****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86] => (item={'src': 'httpd.conf', 'dest': '/etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf'})ok: [192.168.6.86] => (item={'src': 'magic', 'dest': '/etc/httpd/conf/magic'})TASK [Make sure Apache is started now and at boot.] *********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP **************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=4 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 4.2.1 Limiting playbooks to particular hosts and groups123456789101112指定一个分组：ansible-playbook playbook.yml --limit webservers指定具体机器：ansible-playbook playbook.yml --limit xyz.example.com列出待执行机器；ansible-playbook playbook.yml --list-hosts(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter4 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.yml --list-hostsplaybook: playbook.yml play #1 (all): all TAGS: [] pattern: ['all'] hosts (1): 192.168.6.86 4.2.2 Setting user and sudo options with ansible-playbook通过–user指定执行命令的机器：1ansible-playbook playbook.yml --user=johndoe 指定janedoe作为sudo用户执行命令，并要求输入密码：1ansible-playbook playbook.yml --become --become-user=janedoe --ask-become-pass 4.2.3 Other options for ansible-playbook –inventory=PATH (-i PATH): Define a custom inventory file (default is the default Ansible inventory file, usually located at /etc/ansible/hosts). –verbose (-v): Verbose mode (show all output, including output from successful options). You can pass in -vvvv to give every minute detail. –extra-vars=VARS (-e VARS): Define variables to be used in the playbook, in “key=value,key=value” format. –forks=NUM (-f NUM): Number for forks (integer). Set this to a number higher than 5 to increase the number of servers on which Ansible will run tasks concurrently. –connection=TYPE (-c TYPE): The type of connection which will be used (this defaults to ssh; you might sometimes want to use local to run a playbook on your local machine, or on a remote server via cron). –check: Run the playbook in Check Mode (‘Dry Run’); all tasks defined in the playbook will be checked against all hosts, but none will actually be run. 4.2.4 ansible-inventory123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter3 $ ansible-inventory -i inventory --list{ "_meta": { "hostvars": { "192.168.60.4": { "ansible_ssh_private_key_file": "~/.vagrant.d/insecure_private_key", "ansible_ssh_user": "vagrant" }, "192.168.60.5": { "ansible_ssh_private_key_file": "~/.vagrant.d/insecure_private_key", "ansible_ssh_user": "vagrant" }, "192.168.60.6": { "ansible_ssh_private_key_file": "~/.vagrant.d/insecure_private_key", "ansible_ssh_user": "vagrant" } } }, "all": { "children": [ "multi", "ungrouped" ] }, "app": { "hosts": [ "192.168.60.4", "192.168.60.5" ] }, "db": { "hosts": [ "192.168.60.6" ] }, "multi": { "children": [ "app", "db" ] }} 4.3 Real-world playbook: Ubuntu server with Solr下面，我们在Ubuntu 20.04上安装一个Apache Solr，至少需要512M内存 4.3.1 Include a variables file, and more pre_tasks创建playbook.yml文件，指定变量文件：vars.yml:playbook.yml:123456---- hosts: all become: true vars_files: - vars.yml vars.yml:12345---download_dir: /tmpsolr_dir: /opt/solrsolr_version: 8.7.0solr_checksum: sha512:15a3af83997e2cbc4bfed304f7d43efd260674d98059241605ff3cde0ae02d8bd1ccd56973c6cba1cc11895655bb76fcf1991bbb94b004e517ce15f728fa163f 为了确保apt-cache为最新状态，在playbook.yml中添加如下内容：12345678910---- hosts: all become: true vars_files: - vars.yml pre_tasks: - name: Update apt cache if needed. apt: update_cache=true cache_valid_time=3600 接下来使用apt module来安装openjdk:1234567891011121314---- hosts: all become: true vars_files: - vars.yml pre_tasks: - name: Update apt cache if needed. apt: update_cache=true cache_valid_time=3600 tasks: - name: Install Java. apt: name=openjdk-14-jre-headless state=present 下面安装Apache Solr, Ubuntu LTS提前安装了一个Solr，但不是最新，我们先下载最新版本：1234567891011121314151617181920---- hosts: all become: true vars_files: - vars.yml pre_tasks: - name: Update apt cache if needed. apt: update_cache=true cache_valid_time=3600 tasks: - name: Install Java. apt: name=openjdk-14-jre-headless state=present - name: Download Solr. get_url: url: "https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/lucene/solr/{{ solr_version }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" dest: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" checksum: "{{ solr_checksum }}" dest中要指定到具体的文件名字，否则再次执行的时候，ansible会重新下载一次。下面解压下载下来的文件：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627---- hosts: all become: true vars_files: - vars.yml pre_tasks: - name: Update apt cache if needed. apt: update_cache=true cache_valid_time=3600 tasks: - name: Install Java. apt: name=openjdk-14-jre-headless state=present - name: Download Solr. get_url: url: "https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/lucene/solr/{{ solr_version }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" dest: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" checksum: "{{ solr_checksum }}" - name: Expand Solr. unarchive: src: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" dest: "{{ download_dir }}" remote_src: true creates: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}/README.txt" 最后一行添加creates是为了保证幂等性，unarchive的src参数可以直接指定下载url，我们分成两步是因为后面还会用到下载的压缩包。下面，就是执行Solr安装脚本进行安装了：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738---- hosts: all become: true vars_files: - vars.yml pre_tasks: - name: Update apt cache if needed. apt: update_cache=true cache_valid_time=3600 tasks: - name: Install Java. apt: name=openjdk-14-jre-headless state=present - name: Download Solr. get_url: url: "https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/lucene/solr/{{ solr_version }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" dest: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" checksum: "{{ solr_checksum }}" - name: Expand Solr. unarchive: src: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" dest: "{{ download_dir }}" remote_src: true creates: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}/README.txt" - name: Run Solr installation script. command: > {{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}/bin/install_solr_service.sh {{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz -i /opt -d /var/solr -u solr -s solr -p 8983 creates={{ solr_dir }}/bin/solr 最后，确保Solr已经启动并且添加到了开机自启动中：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041---- hosts: all become: true vars_files: - vars.yml pre_tasks: - name: Update apt cache if needed. apt: update_cache=true cache_valid_time=3600 tasks: - name: Install Java. apt: name=openjdk-14-jre-headless state=present - name: Download Solr. get_url: url: "https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/lucene/solr/{{ solr_version }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" dest: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" checksum: "{{ solr_checksum }}" - name: Expand Solr. unarchive: src: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz" dest: "{{ download_dir }}" remote_src: true creates: "{{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}/README.txt" - name: Run Solr installation script. command: > {{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}/bin/install_solr_service.sh {{ download_dir }}/solr-{{ solr_version }}.tgz -i /opt -d /var/solr -u solr -s solr -p 8983 creates={{ solr_dir }}/bin/solr - name: Ensure solr is started and enabled on boot. service: name=solr state=started enabled=yes 在执行脚本之前，添加inventory文件：123456[solr]192.168.6.86[solr:vars]ansible_user=ubuntuansible_ssh_pass=ubuntu 执行安装脚本：1ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.yml 报错如下：123456789(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/solr $ ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.ymlPLAY [all] ***********************************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************fatal: [10.211.55.6]: FAILED! => {"msg": "Missing sudo password"}PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************10.211.55.6 : ok=0 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=1 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 参考： https://stackoverflow.com/questions/25582740/missing-sudo-password-in-ansible两种解决方法：第一种： 12345ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.yml -kK SSH password: BECOME password[defaults to SSH password]: -k, --ask-pass: ask for connection password-K, --ask-become-pass: ask for privilege escalation password 第二种：1ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.yml --extra-vars "ansible_sudo_pass=alexis.yang" 本次我们先试用第一种方法。1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/solr $ ansible-playbook -i inventory playbook.yml -kKSSH password:BECOME password[defaults to SSH password]:PLAY [all] ***********************************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Update apt cache if needed.] ***********************************************************************************************changed: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Install Java.] *************************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Download Solr.] ************************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Expand Solr.] **************************************************************************************************************changed: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Run Solr installation script.] *********************************************************************************************changed: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Ensure solr is started and enabled on boot.] *******************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************10.211.55.6 : ok=7 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 由于网络问题，我们提前把solr下载好，放到了/tmp目录下，因此[Download Solr.]步骤的结果是ok.启动完成后，我们在本机通过浏览器访问：http://10.211.55.6:8983/solr/看到Solr的Dashboard界面即表示安装完成。

posts.title: Chapter5-Ansible-Playbooks-Beyond-The-Basics
posts.text: 5.0 环境准备为了演示变量的作用，本次我们使用两台机器，一台CentOS，一台Ubuntu。首先，inventory文件： 1234567891011121314[centos]192.168.6.86[centos:vars]ansible_user=rootansible_ssh_pass=[ubuntu]10.211.55.6[ubuntu:vars]ansible_user=alexisansible_ssh_pass=alexisansible_become_pass=alexis 再写一个playbook，名称为apache.yml：12345678910111213141516---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true 执行一下这个playbook：123456789101112131415(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=3 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 5.1 HandlersHandler本身也是一个Task，下面我们添加一个handler，在task的最后通过notify指定如果task的结果为changed的时候执行的Handler，例如，我们拷贝完配置文件后，重启httpd：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true 通常，我们给task命名的时候最后都会加上一个Full Stop，但是给Handler命名的时候一般都为全部小写字母，最后不加Full Stop.我们修改一下配置文件，执行一下：123456789101112131415161718192021(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy Test Config File.] ****************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]RUNNING HANDLER [restart apache] *************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=5 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 我们看到，Handler是在真个playbook执行完成之后才执行的，如果我们想修改完配置文件，立即重启，怎么做呢?我们可以使用meta module立即刷新handler.123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache - name: Make Sure Handlers are flushed immediately. meta: flush_handlers - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true 再次修改一下配置文件，重新执行：123456789101112131415161718192021(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy Test Config File.] ****************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]RUNNING HANDLER [restart apache] *************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=5 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 可以发现，在复制完文件后，立即执行了重启服务的Handler操作。 由于默认是把Handler添加到最后执行的，所以，当执行过程中出现fail的时候，Handler默认不会执行。我们制造一个失败，并修改配置文件，执行playbook：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache # - name: Make Sure Handlers are flushed immediately. # meta: flush_handlers - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true - fail: 结果：1234567891011121314151617181920212223(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy Test Config File.] ****************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [fail] **********************************************************************************************************************fatal: [192.168.6.86]: FAILED! => {"changed": false, "msg": "Failed as requested from task"}RUNNING HANDLER [restart apache] *************************************************************************************************PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=4 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=1 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 有尝试去执行Handler，但是结果未执行。我们可以添加--force-handlers强制在即使失败的情况下也执行Handler：123456789101112131415161718192021222324(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.yml --force-handlersPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy Test Config File.] ****************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [fail] **********************************************************************************************************************fatal: [192.168.6.86]: FAILED! => {"changed": false, "msg": "Failed as requested from task"}RUNNING HANDLER [restart apache] :*************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=5 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=1 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 我们可以以列表的形式同时notify多个Handler：修改playbook：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted - name: restart memcached service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: - restart apache - restart memcached - name: Ensure Memcached is Installed. yum: name: memcached state: present # - name: Make Sure Handlers are flushed immediately. # meta: flush_handlers - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true - name: Ensure Memcached is running and starts at boot. service: name: memcached state: started enabled: true 修改配置文件并执行：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy Test Config File.] ****************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Memcached is Installed.] ********************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Memcached is running and starts at boot.] ***************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]RUNNING HANDLER [restart apache] *************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]RUNNING HANDLER [restart memcached] **********************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=8 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 可以看出两个Handler都被执行了，当然也可以在一个Handler中以notify的形式调用另外一个Handler：playbook:1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted notify: restart memcached - name: restart memcached service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache - name: Ensure Memcached is Installed. yum: name: memcached state: present # - name: Make Sure Handlers are flushed immediately. # meta: flush_handlers - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true - name: Ensure Memcached is running and starts at boot. service: name: memcached state: started enabled: true 执行：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy Test Config File.] ****************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Memcached is Installed.] ********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Memcached is running and starts at boot.] ***************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]RUNNING HANDLER [restart apache] *************************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]RUNNING HANDLER [restart memcached] **********************************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=8 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 同样是两个handler依次被执行了下面，去掉memcached相关的内容来做其他测试：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true 5.2 Environment variablesEnvironment variables我们可以通过lineinfile module来修改环境变量12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Add enviroment variable to the remote users' bash_profile. lineinfile: dest: "~/.bash_profile" regexp: '^ENV_VAR=' line: 'ENV_VAR=value' become: false - name: Get the value of an enviroment variable. shell: 'source ~/.bash_profile && echo $ENV_VAR' register: foo - debug: msg='The variable is {{ foo.stdout }}' - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true 获取变量时我们使用了shell模块，因为用到了&&符号，command模块不支持。shell模块中使用了register，是为了将shell的结果从控制台注册到变量中，否则我们无法获取到。debug模块将结果打印到最终输出中。执行结果：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Add enviroment variable to the remote users' bash_profile.] ****************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Get the value of an enviroment variable.] **********************************************************************************changed: [192.168.6.86]TASK [debug] *********************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86] => { "msg": "The variable is value"}TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Copy Test Config File.] ****************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=7 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 5.2.1 Task Based Environment Setting1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Download a file. get_url: url: xxx.zip dest: /tmp enviroment: http_proxy: http://example_proxy:80/ https_proxy: https://example_proxy:80/ - name: Get the value of an enviroment variable. shell: 'source ~/.bash_profile && echo $ENV_VAR' register: foo - debug: msg='The variable is {{ foo.stdout }}' - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true 注： 这个playbook只是个示例，无法直接运行。 5.2.2 Playbook Based Environment Setting1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true vars: proxy_vars: http_proxy: http://example_proxy:80/ https_proxy: https://example_proxy:80/ handlers: - name: restart apache service: name: httpd state: restarted tasks: - name: Download a file. get_url: url: xxx.zip dest: /tmp enviroment: proxy_vars - name: Get the value of an enviroment variable. shell: 'source ~/.bash_profile && echo $ENV_VAR' register: foo - debug: msg='The variable is {{ foo.stdout }}' - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. yum: name: httpd state: present - name: Copy Test Config File. copy: src: files/httpd.conf dest: /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf notify: restart apache - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: httpd state: started enabled: true 注： 这个playbook只是个示例，无法直接运行。 5.3 Variables我们上面的playbook只能在redhat上运行，下面我们要让它能同时在redhat和Ubuntu上运行，要做到这一点，需要使用dynamic variables。我们首先把服务名称抽出来作为变量：为了通用，yum可以改成package：centos:1234567891011121314151617181920---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true vars: apache_package: httpd apache_service: httpd tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. package: name: "{{ apache_package }}" state: present - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: "{{ apache_service }}" state: started enabled: true 执行：123456789101112131415(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=3 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 ubuntu:1234567891011121314151617181920---- name: Install Apache. hosts: ubuntu become: true vars: apache_package: apache2 apache_service: apache2 tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. package: name: "{{ apache_package }}" state: present - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: "{{ apache_service }}" state: started enabled: true 执行：1234567891011121314151617(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.yml -kKSSH password:BECOME password[defaults to SSH password]:PLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************changed: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************10.211.55.6 : ok=3 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 可是，这里还有一个小问题，每次切换系统的时候除了要修改hosts,还要主动修改vars中所有变量的名字，可以将变量放到不同的配置文件中来解决：1234567891011121314151617181920212223---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true pre_tasks: - debug: msg='ansible_os_family is {{ ansible_os_family }}' - include_vars: "{{ item }}" with_first_found: - "apache_{{ ansible_os_family }}.yml" - "apache_defaults.yml" tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. package: name: "{{ apache_package }}" state: present - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: "{{ apache_service }}" state: started enabled: true 执行：1234567891011121314151617181920212223(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [debug] *********************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86] => { "msg": "ansible_os_family is RedHat"}TASK [include_vars] **************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86] => (item=/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5/vars/apache_RedHat.yml)TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************192.168.6.86 : ok=5 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 此时，我们只是简单的将hosts改为Ubuntu：1234567891011121314151617181920212223---- name: Install Apache. hosts: ubuntu become: true pre_tasks: - debug: msg='ansible_os_family is {{ ansible_os_family }}' - include_vars: "{{ item }}" with_first_found: - "apache_{{ ansible_os_family }}.yml" - "apache_defaults.yml" tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. package: name: "{{ apache_package }}" state: present - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: "{{ apache_service }}" state: started enabled: true 为了让执行命令保持一致，不需要添加-K参数，我们修改inventory文件：1234567891011121314[centos]192.168.6.86[centos:vars]ansible_user=rootansible_ssh_pass=[ubuntu]10.211.55.6[ubuntu:vars]ansible_user=alexisansible_ssh_pass=ansible_become_pass= 再次执行：1234567891011121314151617181920212223(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]TASK [debug] *********************************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6] => { "msg": "ansible_os_family is Debian"}TASK [include_vars] **************************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6] => (item=/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5/vars/apache_defaults.yml)TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************10.211.55.6 : ok=5 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 我们可以看到，同样的脚本，只需要更改一下hosts变量，就可以分别在CentOS和Ubuntu上执行了。我们也可以将hosts改为all，在所有机器上执行：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory apache.ymlPLAY [Install Apache.] ***********************************************************************************************************TASK [Gathering Facts] ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [debug] *********************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86] => { "msg": "ansible_os_family is RedHat"}ok: [10.211.55.6] => { "msg": "ansible_os_family is Debian"}TASK [include_vars] **************************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86] => (item=/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5/vars/apache_RedHat.yml)ok: [10.211.55.6] => (item=/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5/vars/apache_defaults.yml)TASK [Ensure Apache is Installed.] ***********************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]ok: [10.211.55.6]TASK [Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot.] ******************************************************************************ok: [10.211.55.6]ok: [192.168.6.86]PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************10.211.55.6 : ok=5 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0192.168.6.86 : ok=5 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 是ansible执行的时候gather的fact变量，我们可以通过下面的setup模块查看所有的fact变量：1ansible -i inventory centos -m setup 如果我们在playbook的头上添加：1gather_facts: false ansible执行的时候就不会获取这些facts，后面执行的时候就会失败。我们可以通过register将执行结果注册到变量中，然后在debug中获取变量的值：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526---- name: Install Apache. hosts: centos become: true pre_tasks: - debug: msg='ansible_os_family is {{ ansible_os_family }}' - include_vars: "{{ item }}" with_first_found: - "apache_{{ ansible_os_family }}.yml" - "apache_defaults.yml" tasks: - name: Ensure Apache is Installed. package: name: "{{ apache_package }}" state: present register: foo - debug: var=foo - name: Ensure Apache is running and starts at boot. service: name: "{{ apache_service }}" state: started enabled: true 执行：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/chapter5 $ ansible-playbook -i inventory ***********************************************************************************************************ok: [192.168.6.86]TASK [debug] 通常，我们使用[]的形式，因为如果使用.如果后面有中划线的话是无法解析出来的。 5.3.1 Ansible Vault - Keeping secrets secret先准备测试环境：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435(base) Attempting to decrypt but no vault secrets found 我们有几种方式来指定密码，首先，在交互式命令行：123456789101112131415(base) alexis@ychenchen:/Users/alexis/Sites/vault $ ansible-playbook -i inventory main.yml --ask-vault-passVault password:PLAY [localhost] *****************************************************************************************************************TASK [Echo the API key which was injected into the env.] *************************************************************************changed: [localhost]TASK [Show the result.] **********************************************************************************************************ok: [localhost] => { "echo_result.stdout": "l9bTqfBlbXTQiDaJMqgPJ1VdeFLfId98"}PLAY RECAP ***********************************************************************************************************************localhost : ok=2 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0 其他Vault相关的命令：12345ansible-vault editrekeycreateviewdecrypt 所有这些命令都可以同时作用于多个文件，例如；1ansible-vault create x.yml y.yml z.yml 对于文件较多的情况下，可以把密码保存到本机文件，更改权限未600，并在执行的时候指定密码文件。12# Use --vault-password-file to supply the password via file/script.$ ansible-playbook main.yml --vault-password-file ~/.ansible/vault_pass.txt 5.4 If/then/when - Conditionals很多任务需要在特定的条件下执行，一些module内置了幂等性，但command和shell这类module需要我们自定义条件来判断是否需要执行。 5.4.1 Jinja Expressions, Python built-ins, and Logic12345678910# The following expressions evaluate to 'true':1 in [1, 2, 3]'see' in 'Can you see me?'foo != bar(1 < 2) and ('a' not in 'best')# The following expressions evaluate to 'false':4 in [1, 2, 3]foo == bar(foo != foo) or (a in [1, 2, 3]) 123- name: Do something only for version 4 of the software. [task here] when: software_version.split('.')[0] == '4' 值得注意的是，当我们想做更高级的变量操作的时候，最好使用python语法。 5.4.2 register任何play都可以register一个变量，一旦注册，后续所有tasks中都可以使用它。将shell的输出(stdout/stderr)注册到变量：12- shell: my_command_here register: my_command_result 访问：12my_command_result.stdoutmy_command_result.stderr 5.4.3 when12- yum: name=mysql-server state=present when: is_db_server when和register一起使用：12345- command: my-app --status register: myapp_result- command: do-something-to-my-app when: "'ready' in myapp_result.stdout" 其他现实中使用when的例子：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031# From our Node.js playbook - register a command's output, then see# if the path to our app is in the output. Start the app if it's# not present.- command: forever list register: forever_list- command: forever start /path/to/app/app.js when: "forever_list.stdout.find('/path/to/app/app.js') == -1"# Run 'ping-hosts.sh' script if 'ping_hosts' variable is true.- command: /usr/local/bin/ping-hosts.sh when: ping_hosts# Run 'git-cleanup.sh' script if a branch we're interested in is# missing from git's list of branches in our project.- command: chdir=/path/to/project git branch register: git_branches- command: /path/to/project/scripts/git-cleanup.sh when: "(is_app_server == true) and ('interesting-branch' not in \ git_branches.stdout)"# Downgrade PHP version if the current version contains '7.0'.- shell: php --version register: php_version- shell: yum -y downgrade php* when: "'7.0' in php_version.stdout"# Copy a file to the remote server if the hosts file doesn't exist.- stat: path=/etc/hosts register: hosts_file- copy: src=path/to/local/file dest=/path/to/remote/file when: hosts_file.stat.exists == false 5.4.4 changed_when and failed_when对于command or shell模块，如果不使用changed_when, ansible总是会报告change。使用例子：changed_when:1234- name: Install dependencies via Composer. command: "/usr/local/bin/composer global require phpunit/phpunit --prefer-dist" register: composer changed_when: "'Nothing to install' not in composer.stdout" failed_when:123456- name: Import a Jenkins job via CLI. shell: > java -jar /opt/jenkins-cli.jar -s http://localhost:8080/ create-job "My Job" < /usr/local/my-job.xml register: import failed_when: "import.stderr and 'exists' not in import.stderr" 5.4.5 ignore_errors有时候，我们想忽略错误，继续执行后面的任务，可以在task中添加：ignore_errors: true,但最好谨慎使用它。 5.5 Delegation, Local Actions, and Pauses5.6 Prompts5.7 Tags在Ansible中，可以对任何内容打标签，例如：12345678910111213141516171819202122---# You can apply tags to an entire play.- hosts: webservers tags: deploy roles: # Tags applied to a role will be applied to tasks in the role. - role: tomcat tags: ['tomcat', 'app'] tasks: - name: Notify on completion. local_action: module: osx_say msg: "{{inventory_hostname}} is finished!" voice: Zarvox tags: - notifications - say - import_tasks: foo.yml tags: foo 可以通过--tags指定执行带哪些标签的：1ansible-playbook tags.yml --tags "tomcat,say" 可以指定哪些标签的不执行：1ansible-playbook tags.yml --skip-tags "notifications" 多tags的语法：1234567891011# Shorthand list syntax.tags: ['one', 'two', 'three']# Explicit list syntax.tags: - one - two - three# Non-working example.tags: one, two, three 由于tags使用的时候需要有一套完整的定义模式，可能会引起混乱，因此，除非是同时管理很多playbooks，不建议频繁使用tags。 5.8 Blocks
